channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] CHECHNYA → nan : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Semibugry, Astrakhanskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: CHECHNYA / nan. Location: Semibugry, Astrakhanskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → ZHEJIANG : Fight with small arms and light weapons (Moscow, Moskva, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: RUSSIA / ZHEJIANG. Location: Moscow, Moskva, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → GAZA : Fight with small arms and light weapons (Canada)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: ISRAEL / GAZA. Location: Canada. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: MUSLIM / LEBANON. Location: Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Torture. Actors: ACTIVIST / nan. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Abduct, hijack, or take hostage. Actors: SUDANESE / nan. Location: Sudan. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.
